name: Chicken Scallopine W/Mushroom Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 t Green Onion - finely chopped (white part only)
1 lb Chicken Breasts - boned and skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken between sheets of waxed paper until thin.
2. Combine flour, salt, and pepper in a pie plate.
3. Beat egg with water in a shallow dish.
4. Dredge the meat in flour, dip in egg mixture, and roll well in breadcrumbs. Let sit on wax paper for 10 minutes.
5. Heat oil and butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Add meat in batches and saute until browned, turning once, about 3-5 minutes, adding more oil and butter if necessary. Keep warm and spoon mushroom sauce (see recipe).
7. Mushroom Sauce:
- Combine broth and flour in a small bowl and stir until flour is dissolved.
- Melt butter in the skillet over medium-high heat.
- Add onion and saute until tender, about 1 minute.
- Reduce heat to medium; add mushrooms; saute for 2-3 minutes.
- Stir in broth. Increase heat to medium-high and cook until slightly thick, stirring occasionally, about 10 minutes.
- Blend in cream, salt, and pepper. Season to taste with nutmeg and cayenne pepper.
Variation: For a thicker gravy, omit the whipping cream. The gravy will also be browner. (Or add Kitchen Bouquet to darken the sauce.) Note: Using two frying pans is best for serving this dish to company. It pairs well with Fettucine Alfredo and Stuffed Tomatoes!
